name: Tor Snowflake Proxy
compose:
name: slashnode-snowflake
services:
  proxy:
    image: thetorproject/snowflake-proxy:v2.14.1
    container_name: snowflake-proxy
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: '-log /data/snowflake.log -verbose'
    volumes:
      - proxy_data:/data
  web:
    image: sorenisanerd/gotty:v1.6.0
    container_name: snowflake-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: gotty --port 3800 --index "/snowflake/index.html" --title-format "Tor Snowflake Proxy" bash -c 'tail -n 10000 -f /snowflake/snowflake.log | grep "Traffic Relayed"'
    volumes:
      - web_data:/snowflake
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3800:3800
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  proxy_data:
    name: slashnode-snowflake_proxy_data
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-snowflake_web_data
